verses.text: Judah gam leh Jerusalem tawh kisai thu Amoz' tapa Isaiah' muhna hih bang ahi hi
Nidang ciangin Topa' inn a omna mual pen mual liante lakah a sangpenin kikipsak ding a, mual neute tungah kisangsak ding hi. Tua lai-ah minam khempeuh pai muamua ding uh a

mi tampite hong pai-in, “Hong pai un, amah in ama zialetongte hong hilh theihna ding leh ama lampite i zuih theihna dingin Jakob' Pasian' inn, Topa' mualah paito ni,” a ci ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Zion panin thu hong gen ding a, Jerusalem khua panin Topa' thuhilhna hong paikhia ding hi

Amah in minamte khatlekhat kikalah thu khenin, mi tampite' thu khensak ding hi. Amaute in a namsaute uh lokhawhna tu, a teipite uh singhiang heuhna temkawi-in a seek ding uh hi. Minam khat leh minam khat kido nawnlo ding uh a, galdo dingin kithawi nawnlo ding uh hi.
Jakob' suanlekhakte aw, hong pai un; Topa' khuavak sungah gamta ni
Amaute pen nisuahna lam gama om khongkhaite leh Filistia mite bangin aisante tawh kidim uh a, gamdang mite' ngeina zui uh ahih manin Jakob suanlekhak, na mite nang na nial hi
Amau' gamah ngun leh kham kidim a, amau' sumte in bei hun cih neilo hi. Amau' gam pen sakolte tawh kidim a, amau' leengte in bei hun cih neilo hi
Amau' gamsung milimte tawh kidim a, amau' khut tawh a bawlsate uh amaute in a bia uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin mite kiniamkhiat sukin, mite a niamin kikoih suk hi. Amaute' mawhna maisak kei in
Topa kihtakna leh a lian ama minthan'na panin suanghawm sungah lut un la, leihawm sungah bu un
Mite' kiliatsakna pen kiniam koih ding a, mihingte' kiphatsakna pen kiniamkhiat ding hi. Tua ni ciangin Topa bek a lianin kikoih ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa in a kiphasak leh a kiliansak khempeuh, a kisangsak leh a sangte khempeuh
a sang, a kilaamto, Lebanon mual taamtak kung khempeuh, Bashan mual tawsaw kung khempeuh
a lian mual sang khempeuh leh a sang mualneu khempeuh
tausang khempeuh leh a muan'huai kulhte khempeuh
Tarshish teembaw khempeuh leh teembaw hoih khempeuh a niamkoih hun ding ni khat a nei hi
Mite' kiliatsakna kiniamkhiat ding a, mite' kiphatsakna a niamin kikoihsuk ding hi. Tua ni ciangin Topa bek a lianin kikoih ding hi
Milimte khempeuh mangthang khin ding hi
Leitung a lingsakgawp dingin Topa a kipat ciangin amah kihtakna leh a lian ama minthan'na panin suanghawm sung leh leihawm sungah mite bu ding uh hi

Amah pen leitung a lingsakgawp dingin a hong kipat hun ciangin Topa kihtakna leh a lian ama minthan'na vang panin suanghawmpite sung leh keenhawmte sungah a buk theihna dingun amau' bawltawm ngun leh kham milimte, buite leh bakte a paih ding uh hi
Mihingte muan'in nei nawn kei un. Amaute leltak banga simtham ding ahi hiam?
